FAIL src/__tests__/e2e/auth.e2e.test.ts
  E2E Authentication Flow
    User Registration
      ├ù POST /api/auth/register should create new user with valid data (9 ms)
      ├ù POST /api/auth/register should reject duplicate email
      ├ù POST /api/auth/register should reject invalid email format
      ├ù POST /api/auth/register should reject weak password
      ├ù POST /api/auth/register should reject missing required fields
    User Login
      ├ù POST /api/auth/login should authenticate valid user (1 ms)
      ├ù POST /api/auth/login should reject invalid password
      ├ù POST /api/auth/login should reject non-existent user
      ├ù POST /api/auth/login should reject invalid email format
      ├ù POST /api/auth/login should reject missing credentials
    Protected Routes
      ├ù GET /api/users/profile should return user profile with valid token (1 ms)
      ├ù GET /api/users/profile should reject request without token (1 ms)
      ├ù GET /api/users/profile should reject request with invalid token
      ├ù GET /api/users/profile should reject request with expired token (1 ms)
    Token Refresh
      ├ù POST /api/auth/refresh should return new access token (1 ms)
      ├ù POST /api/auth/refresh should reject invalid refresh token (1 ms)
    User Logout
      ├ù POST /api/auth/logout should invalidate session
      ├ù POST /api/auth/logout should reject request without token
    Password Reset Flow
      ├ù POST /api/auth/forgot-password should accept valid email (1 ms)
      ├ù POST /api/auth/forgot-password should handle non-existent email gracefully
      ├ù POST /api/auth/reset-password should update password with valid token (1 ms)
    Rate Limiting
      ├ù Multiple failed login attempts should trigger rate limiting
      ├ù Successful requests should not be rate limited (1 ms)
    CSRF Protection
      ├ù State-changing requests should require CSRF token

      ├ù GET /api/workouts/:id should return specific workout (1 ms)
      ├ù GET /api/workouts/:id should reject request for non-existent workout (1 ms)

      ├ù GET /api/workouts should support pagination (7 ms)
      ├ù GET /api/workouts should support filtering by date range (1 ms)

      ├ù PUT /api/workouts/:id should update workout details (1 ms)
      ├ù PUT /api/workouts/:id should update exercises
      ├ù PUT /api/workouts/:id should reject invalid workout ID (1 ms)
      ├ù PUT /api/workouts/:id should reject updates to other user's workout

      ├ù DELETE /api/workouts/:id should remove workout

      ├ù GET /api/workouts/stats should support date filtering (1 ms)

      ├ù Multiple simultaneous workout creations should succeed
